title: The Secret of How Ukraine’s Lifesaving Air-Raid Alarms Work
author: Cassandra Vinograd and Oleksandr Chubko
fullText: Many in Ukraine assume that the alerts are automated. A rare look inside an emergency-response center reveals the specialists who do the pressure-packed job.
summary: Many in Ukraine assume that the alerts are automated. A rare look inside an emergency-response center reveals the specialists who do the pressure-packed job.
